item.title: Moderna to Pay Up to $2.25B to Settle Patent Suit Over Covid-19 Vaccine Technology
item.description: If Moderna's full financial payout to the companies is reached, it would rank among the largest disclosed patent settlements in biopharmaceutical indu...

item.title: World’s Deadliest Sharks Only One-Third As Deadly To Minnesotans In 2026 As ICE, Trump’s Stupid War

item.description: While Gen. Dan Caine said the US has "sufficient precision munitions for the task at hand," lawmakers are considering a high-dollar supplemental infus...

item.title: Kathryn Ruemmler To Give House Testimony After ‘Uncle Jeffrey’ Emails Spark Firestorm
item.description: Kathryn Ruemmler isn't done being dragged for her connection with Jeffrey Epstein.

item.title: Iran War Powers Resolution Fails in Senate
item.description: The House is set to vote on a similar measure on Thursday.
